name: graphdyvis
description: Code-driven graph and DAG visualization in a VS Code WebView.

graphdyvis.playback.autoFocusOnEvent.description: Automatically focus and highlight the current event target during playback.

graphdyvis.playback.defaultSpeed.description: Default playback speed multiplier when a visualizer opens.

graphdyvis.aggregation.enabled.description: Enable adaptive aggregation for dense graphs.

graphdyvis.aggregation.minTotalNodes.description: Minimum node count required before aggregation is considered.

graphdyvis.aggregation.minGroupSize.description: Minimum member count required to collapse a node group into an aggregate node.

graphdyvis.aggregation.recentEventWindow.description: Number of recent events used to keep related nodes from being aggregated.

graphdyvis.aggregation.autoCollapseOnFoc.description: Automatically collapse temporary aggregate expansions after focus moves away.

graphdyvis.aggregation.autoCollapseDelay.description: Delay in milliseconds before temporary aggregate expansions collapse.

scripts.build: npm run build:extension && npm run build:webview
scripts.check: npm run check:ts && npm run check:samples
